section: ARECO Schedule A: Assets and Unearned Income
layout_note: Typed attachment table, transposed spreadsheet layout (one asset per column). Only the first of three asset columns is populated; the other two columns are entirely blank. Selections are black-filled cells. The Transaction row is a black band in the populated column (no letter visible) - treated as a divider/redaction, transaction recorded null. The asset has the EIF cell marked.

uncertainties.read: Transaction row black-filled in the populated column
uncertainties.note: black band with no P/S/E letter visible; treated as formatting divider, recorded null
